items.title: It's not the most important thing by any means, but I did find myself last night yearning for a Gradey Dick bedazzled jacket, or a Steph Castle iced-out castle chain, or "the camera finds a Hawks fan chugging beer oddly." The first round all just felt kind of ... matter-of-fact?
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: It's not the most important thing by any means, but I did find myself last night yearning for a Gradey Dick bedazzled jacket, or a Steph Castle iced-out castle chain, or "the camera finds a Hawks fan chugging beer oddly." The first round all just felt kind of ... matter-of-fact?

items.title: Raptors' Gradey Dick Trade is a Matter of When, Not If
items.author: Yahoo Sports
